prompt: Combining the two images together. The lady in image 1 use the umbrella as guard to prevent the guy in image 2 to attack her.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Integrate the man from image 2 into the scene. Position the man from image 2 in the foreground, facing the lady from image 1, in an aggressive, attacking posture with his sword drawn. The lady from image 1 should be using her umbrella as a defensive shield or guard, holding it directly between herself and the attacking man to prevent his advance.
objects: Lady using umbrella as a defensive shield or guard
Man in an aggressive, attacking posture
Umbrella positioned directly between the lady and the man
